WQ.name: WQ
WQ.applicableDaysHtml:
Monday to Friday


This is a temporary restriction used on dates when engineering work is taking place, for routes where restriction WV usually applies. Validity will match WV unless stated in the easement text.
WQ.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday

restrictions.outwardHtml:
Not valid for travel on trains timed to depart after 04:29 and before the times shown from the following stations: 

  • 07:40 from Bridgend (also valid between 02:00 and 04:45);
  • 08:55 from Bristol Parkway (also valid between 02:00 and 05:30);
  • 08:26 from Bristol Temple Meads (also valid between 02:00 and 05:10);
  • 08:10 from Cardiff Central (also valid between 02:00 and 05:30);
  • 08:25 from Gloucester
  • 07:25 from Neath
  • 08:25 from Newport (South Wales) (also valid between 02:00 and 05:45);
  • 07:30 from Port Talbot Parkway (also valid between 02:00 and 05:00);
  • 07:15 from Swansea (also valid between 02:00 and 04:30). ​​​​​​​
restrictions.returnHtml:
Not valid on trains timed to depart:

  • London Paddington after 04:29 and before 09:12 and after 16:40 and before 18:32
  • Reading after 04:29 and before 09:38 and after 17:03 and before 18:56
  • Didcot after Midnight and before 09:53
  • London Waterloo after 04:29 and before 08:15

Not valid on trains timed to arrive Salisbury before 09:30.

WS.name: WS
WS.applicableDaysHtml:
Monday to Friday


Mondays to Fridays, except Bank Holidays. Not applicable at weekends.
WS.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays, except Bank Holidays. Not applicable at weekends.
WS.notesHtml: This product is not valid for break of journey in either direction.
WS.notesText: This product is not valid for break of journey in either direction.

restrictions.outwardHtml:

  • 08:39 from Newbury (also not valid between 00:01 and 04:29);

Not valid on trains timed to arrive Salisbury before 09:30.

WV.name: WV
WV.applicableDaysText:
Monday to Friday
 Mondays to Fridays
WV.notesHtml:
Off-Peak tickets from stations not listed are valid for connections into trains departing as shown above.

Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.

Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.

Restriction codes 7E /9J apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.

For travel on CrossCountry please use 2V.
WV.notesText:
Off-Peak tickets from stations not listed are valid for connections into trains departing as shown above.
 Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.
 Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.
 Restriction codes 7E / 9J apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.
 For travel on CrossCountry please use 2V .
WV.seasonalVariationsHtml:
GWR Christmas and New Year Travel Restrictions 2025/26

Up to and including Friday 19 December: Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 December:

Off-Peak tickets valid all day.

Super Off-Peak tickets subject to normal restriction times.

Monday 29 December to Friday 02 January * No ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 05 January 2026 onwards Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Journey planners have been updated with the above information.

*Please note this only applies to journeys priced by GWR. Flows within Wales, between Cheltenham and Gloucester and long-distance routes to areas not served by GWR are priced by other train companies, who may have different Christmas travel restrictions in place. Usual restrictions will apply to CPAY and may apply to other Operators’ services. Please check retail systems if unsure.

Customers using Off-Peak travel cards and arriving at London Paddington before 09:30 on weekdays, will need to wait until 09:30 for onward travel from Paddington.

Restriction code WO applies to all journeys via Newbury or Didcot Parkway, not passing through Reading.

Restriction code Q8 applies to all journeys via Fareham / Southampton / Salisbury.

Restriction codes 7E /9J apply to all journeys via London St Pancras International.

WX.seasonalVariationsHtml:
GWR Christmas and New Year Travel Restrictions 2025/26

Up to and including Friday 19 December: Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 22 to Wednesday 24 December:

Off-Peak tickets valid all day.

Super Off-Peak tickets subject to normal restriction times.

Monday 29 December to Friday 02 January * No ticket restrictions apply.

Monday 05 January 2026 onwards Usual ticket restrictions apply.

Journey planners have been updated with the above information.

*Please note this only applies to journeys priced by GWR. Flows within Wales, between Cheltenham and Gloucester and long-distance routes to areas not served by GWR are priced by other train companies, who may have different Christmas travel restrictions in place. Usual restrictions will apply to CPAY and may apply to other Operators’ services. Please check retail systems if unsure.

Customers using Off-Peak travel cards and arriving at London Paddington before 09:30 on weekdays, will need to wait until 09:30 for onward travel from Paddington.

 London Waterloo after 04:29 and before 08:15 and after 15:59 and before 19:01;
 Birmingham New Street after 04:29 and before 10:30.
 Not valid on trains timed to arrive at:
 Exeter St Davids  after 04:59 and before 11:30
 Salisbury before 09:30 and after 17:40 and before 19:01.
restrictions.returnHtml:
